extensionDescription.message: Set aside tabs for later browsing. Supports container tabs and setting aside entire windows at once.

stashWorkspaceBtn.message: Set aside all tabs in current window

emptyStateHint.message: Click the address bar icon to set aside the current tab

newTabAfterStashToggle.message: Create a new tab after setting aside the entire window to prevent the browser from closing
newTabAfterStashToggle.description: 搁置整个窗口后新建标签页

sortOrderToggle.message: Show latest set-aside tabs at the bottom
sortOrderToggle.description: 最新搁置的标签页排列在底部

clearConfirmTitle.message: Are you sure you want to delete all set-aside tabs and workspaces? This action cannot be undone.
